emails.subject: Tenaska IV 11/01
emails.body: Tenaska IV 11/01 Darren: It's that time again. Please remove the price on deal 384258 for Nov and add a demand fee of $3,096,547.98. Thanks, Megan

emails.subject: RE: Tenaska IV 11/01
emails.body: RE: Tenaska IV 11/01 done. To: Farmer, Daren J.

emails.subject: RE: Tenaska IV 11/01
emails.body: Can you look at this again? I'm missing the 7 before the decimal point. Megan To: Parker, Megan

emails.subject: RE: Tenaska IV 11/01
emails.body: What's the big deal? It's only one digit...But, if it will make you happy, I will fix it. D To: Farmer, Daren J.

emails.subject: RE: Tenaska IV 11/01
emails.body: where are you going? To: Farmer, Daren J.

emails.subject: RE: Tenaska IV 11/01
emails.body: I'm sure that the Panenergy deal is all yours. I definitely understand your concerns. Good luck over there. D To: Farmer, Daren J.
